title: PokeDropEMI Addon
description: Adds a PokeDrops EMI category to quickly view Cobblemon Pokémon drops directly inside EMI.
body:
# PokeDropEMI

PokeDropEMI is a lightweight EMI addon for Cobblemon that adds a dedicated **PokeDrops** category.

It lets you quickly view which items each Pokémon can drop directly inside EMI, without having to open the Pokédex or browse through multiple menus.

## Features

- Adds a new EMI category: **PokeDrops**
- Lists Pokémon → drops in a clean and simple layout
- Supports translated Pokémon names
- Shows drop quantity and chance in the tooltip
- Supports pressing **R** on an item to see which Pokémon can drop it
- Reads Cobblemon runtime drop tables
- Supports locally visible `spawn_pool_world` drops from datapacks
- Shows clean contextual conditions such as:
  - Only in the Nether
  - Only in the End
  - During rain
  - At night
- Includes optional support for **Mega Showdown** Tera Shards when Mega Showdown is installed
- Smartly merges duplicate drops to avoid cluttered entries

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.1
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- Cobblemon 1.6.1
- EMI

## Optional Compatibility

- Mega Showdown  
  When installed, PokeDropEMI can display the Tera Shards added by Mega Showdown as Pokémon drops.

## Notes

PokeDropEMI is client-side focused and reads the data available to the client.

Datapacks that are only present server-side may not appear unless their data is also available client-side. Full server-only datapack support would require a network sync system, which is not included in this version.

## Why use it?

Cobblemon already has drop information, but checking it through the Pokédex can be slower when you are crafting, searching for materials, or managing a modpack.

PokeDropEMI keeps that information directly inside EMI so you can quickly answer:

> “Which Pokémon drops this item?”

or

> “What does this Pokémon drop?”
